title: narcissus lorifolius
intro: Narcissus lorifolius, also known as the white-flowered daffodil, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of alkaloids like galantamine, which has been used to treat conditions like glaucoma, paralysis, and Alzheimer's disease. The health benefits of Narcissus lorifolius include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
